title: Optimize your budget
desc: Allocate 20% more than your estimated costs for unexpected local experiences.
tip: Check for 'Free Walking Tours' in major European cities to save on sightseeing.

title: Travel like a local
desc: Learn basic greetings in the local language to significantly improve your interactions.
tip: Download offline maps for cities where data roaming might be expensive.

title: Stay organized
desc: Use the checklist feature to ensure you never leave your travel documents behind.
tip: Keep a digital copy of your passport in the Traveloop notes section.

title: Best photo spots
desc: Visit popular landmarks during the 'Golden Hour' for the best lighting conditions.
tip: Ask local baristas for hidden rooftop views that aren't on typical tourist maps.
